subject: Updating multus, SRIOV and nfd test cases
commit_message:
Updating multus, SRIOV and nfd test cases

Updating some AddOn test cases and add README.md file.

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1037
Signed-off-by: marvinYu <weifei.yu@intel.com>
Change-Id: Iee2c31207cf2cd37fb8119bceef286aa887079f9

Find you check

Patch Set 9:

Thanks Yu. The CNI version has be 0.3.1, Is that working fine with 0.3.0 as well ?

Patch Set 9:

> Patch Set 9:
> 
> Thanks Yu. The CNI version has be 0.3.1, Is that working fine with 0.3.0 as well ?

Hi Kural, 

In my tests, it worked fine with 0.3.1 version. 
(https://github.com/containernetworking/cni/blob/master/Documentation/spec-upgrades.md#how-to-upgrade-to-cni-specification-v031)This website show the difference between 0.3.0 and 0.3.1 cni version.
If necessary, I can update cniVersion to 0.3.1 and retest this patch.

Patch Set 9:

> Patch Set 9:
> 
> > Patch Set 9:

> (https://github.com/containernetworking/cni/blob/master/Documentation/spec-upgrades.md#how-to-upgrade-to-cni-specification-v031)This website show the difference between 0.3.0 and 0.3.1 cni version.
> If necessary, I can update cniVersion to 0.3.1 and retest this patch.

my bad,I was looking into CNI version in the Network CR. It is totally fine, it works fine, since Multus support all CNI spec version.

Hi Kural,
I have tested this patch in containerized installation. Multus.sh and nfd.sh have passed. sriov.sh can't be tested because the system is installed in a VM which doesn't have SR-IOV NIC. To test sriov.sh, I need a physical machine with Ethernet Controller XL710 NIC and Ubuntu 18.04.

> Hi Kural,
> I have tested this patch in containerized installation. Multus.sh and nfd.sh have passed. sriov.sh can't be tested because the system is installed in a VM which doesn't have SR-IOV NIC. To test sriov.sh, I need a physical machine with Ethernet Controller XL710 NIC and Ubuntu 18.04.

During testing in containerized installation, I met the kubespray bug as Le:
https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kubespray/issues/6160
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/multicloud/k8s/+/106869

I used the workaround provided by Le:
Adding following line to kud/hosting_providers/containerized/inventory/group_vars/k8s-cluster.yml and kud/hosting_providers/vagrant/inventory/group_vars/k8s-cluster.yml:
docker_version: 'latest'

Patch Set 10: Code-Review+1

Tested in Baremetal, VM and containerization as well. Only one issue that the test Multus.sh is didn't call in the installer.sh  script. Please include it. Right now tested Multus.sh manually. SRIOV, NFD are working fine. Please add Multus.sh in the vagrant and containerization installer file.

Hi Kural,
Multus is installed during installing ovn4nfv and sriov. Do you think we need install multus directly or not based on that we want to include the test case for multus?
https://github.com/onap/multicloud-k8s/blob/master/kud/hosting_providers/vagrant/installer.sh#L158
https://github.com/onap/multicloud-k8s/blob/master/kud/hosting_providers/vagrant/installer.sh#L164

Hi Yu Marvin,

Patch is good to merge. I added the patch(https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/multicloud/k8s/+/108215) for Multus test in vagrant and containerization. Also tested it. It is working fine.

Good to merge now.

With regards,
Kural.
